channel.title: Jarvis Strategies Blog
channel.description: Practical thinking on AI implementation for trades and construction companies in the Okanagan.

item.title: Where AI Actually Fits in a Trades Business
item.description: Most AI tools are built for tech companies. Here's how to find the handful that genuinely work for estimating, scheduling, and client communication in the trades.

item.title: World Models, Distillation Wars, and the Inevitable Convergence
item.description: While Western and Chinese AI labs fight over distilled model outputs, the actual next frontier requires something no single country can build alone.

item.title: The Businesses That Jumped In First Are Already Lapping the Ones Still Deciding
item.description: A Google Cloud survey of 3,400 business leaders found 74% of companies using AI are already seeing a return. What that means for Okanagan businesses.

item.title: 73% of BC Businesses Haven't Thought About AI Yet
item.description: 73% of Canadian small businesses haven't considered AI yet. Here's what the ones that have are doing with it, and what that means for Okanagan businesses.

item.title: Don't Believe Everything the Robot Says
item.description: AI sounds confident even when it's making things up. Two habits that keep you from relying on bad answers.

item.title: Five Minutes and a Free Account: Your First Real Conversation with AI
item.description: Opening your first AI account takes five minutes. Here's what to do once you're in, and how to have a conversation that's actually useful.
